import io
import string

fn find_first_eq(_ s: String) -> Int
  let len = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut pos = -1
  mut found = false
  while i < len and not found
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 61
        pos = i
        found = true
      end
    when None
      found = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  pos
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let pos = find_first_eq(line)
      if pos >= 0
        let key = string.substring(line, 0, pos)
        let value = string.substring(line, pos + 1, string.len(line))
        print("#{key}:#{value}")
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
end
